title: Nexus Research Pipeline
mechanism: Cross-disciplinary mechanism discovery joined to upstream/downstream academic-pipeline consistency checks.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it produces a transfer route, rejected false analogy, research-object draft, stale-stage flag, and downstream task update.
falsifier: Fails if it merely returns relevant sources without demonstrating mechanism transfer or upstream/downstream consistency repair.

title: MuranoOS Research Operating Environment
mechanism: A local operating environment where rooms, instruments, agents, memory, review gates, and exports coordinate project work.
acceptance: The slice passes only if room state, instrument state, handoff state, review result, and export boundary are all visible.
falsifier: Fails if it is only a dashboard and does not preserve decisions, state, or review gates.

title: Magnum Opus Scholarly Retrieval And Warrant System
mechanism: A local scholarly retrieval system that separates retrieval, warrant scoring, negative-space reporting, and abstention.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it shows candidate evidence, support score, negative-space note, abstention status, and claim ceiling.
falsifier: Fails if it behaves like a generic search box without warrant, negative-space, or abstention logic.

title: Retrieval Integrity And Poison-RAG Evaluation Harness
mechanism: A retrieval-security harness that measures how contamination timing and packaging deform answers and burden detectors.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it records retrieval trace, contamination window, detector burden, quarantine decision, and answer delta.
falsifier: Fails if it only labels a source poisoned without showing how the answer changed or which defense gate fired.

title: Adversarial Evidence Corruption Technical Annex Harness
mechanism: A technical annex harness for evidence corruption, replay, human/LLM validation, and claim governance.
acceptance: The slice passes only if attack pathway, replay trace, validation split, claim ceiling, and mitigation pattern are all present.
falsifier: Fails if it provides a general warning about poisoned evidence without replay or governance output.

title: Structured Human-AI Analyst Workstation
mechanism: A human-in-the-loop workstation for checking AI output during structured analytic technique execution.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it shows baseline answer, structured answer, human correction, delta explanation, and confidence boundary.
falsifier: Fails if it simply compares two answers without tracing the human correction mechanism.

title: Structured Analytic Technique Studio
mechanism: A studio for updating, combining, sequencing, and testing SATs for human, AI, and human-AI workflows.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it yields a technique sequence, role split, failure warning, reliability check, and revised method note.
falsifier: Fails if it lists SATs without showing sequencing, task fit, or failure handling.

title: Algorithmic Active Measures
mechanism: A research and instrument surface for treating data poisoning and algorithmic manipulation as active-measures tradecraft.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it records influence chain, poisoned channel, amplification path, analyst exposure point, and defensive response.
falsifier: Fails if it describes manipulation generally without locating the algorithmic amplification pathway.

title: Book Trilogy Manuscript Governance System
mechanism: A manuscript governance system separating book voice, chapter structure, source use, passage targets, and public presentation.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it produces a chapter upgrade dossier, register decision, source/passages used, public title, and release status.
falsifier: Fails if it improves prose while losing book-specific register or argument backbone.

title: Russia Source-To-Judgment Desk
mechanism: A source-to-judgment desk connecting Russian security sources, assumptions, alternatives, indicators, and confidence language.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it shows source chain, assumptions, alternatives, indicators, confidence statement, and update trigger.
falsifier: Fails if it jumps from source list to judgment without assumptions, alternatives, and indicators.

title: Master Bundle Packet Promotion Atlas
mechanism: A packet-promotion system for turning a large archive into governed project inputs rather than an unstructured pile.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it creates packet identity, authority state, route, claim ceiling, promotion decision, and next action.
falsifier: Fails if it inventories packets without making a promotion decision.

title: Quantitative Capstone Future Branch
mechanism: A future experimental branch for condition effects, retrieval modes, structured analytic support, scoring, and reliability gates.
acceptance: The slice passes only if it creates condition matrix, scoring rule, reliability plan, disconfirmation condition, and future-work boundary.
falsifier: Fails if it implies validated quantitative findings before the experiment is run.
